title: Fossil fuels causing cost-of-living crisis, climate expert says | The Straits Times
description: PARIS (AFP) - The cost-of-living crisis pushing millions of people towards poverty in Europe is driven by fossil fuels, according to a leading Earth systems scientist, who has warned that global heating risks causing runaway climate change.   Read more at straitstimes.com.
bodyText: Sign up now: Get ST's newsletters delivered to your inbox Earth systems scientist Johan Rockstrom blamed higher prices of fossil fuels and government failures to decarbonise. Published Aug 30, 2022, 05:54 PM Scientific research Economic affairs
